title: angelonia parviflora
intro: Angelonia parviflora, also known as Angel's Trumpet or Dwarf Angelonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Angelonia parviflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural antihistamine. Herbal preparations of Angelonia parviflora can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for topical and internal use.
